items.title: Strait of Hormuz closed again, Iran says, as ships attacked
items.summary: Iran is blaming a US blockade for the closure, saying it breaches the ceasefire reached between the two countries.

items.title: At least six killed in Kyiv as gunman opens fire and takes hostages
items.summary: The attacker, who took hostages inside a supermarket, was killed after a shoot-out with police, officials say.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 圖輯》「阿帕契」飛越荷姆茲海峽！ 美國軍方持續對伊朗海上封鎖

items.title: 日本澀谷廂型車撞入公車站 駕駛死亡、1路人受傷
items.summary: 日本東京都澀谷區公車站，今（19日）上午10時40分遭廂型車撞入，導致廂型車50來歲駕駛喪命，另有1名80來歲老翁路過被波及受傷。  綜合日媒報導，這起事故發生在JR澀谷站東...…

items.title: 驚！英國易捷航空班機超重 要求6名乘客下機
items.summary: 英國廉航易捷航空（easyJet）1架客機，原定11日上午從倫敦紹森機場飛往西班牙馬拉加，孰料因為飛機超重要求6名乘客自願下機，最後有5人離開讓班機起飛。  據《BBC》報導...…
